texto: According to the 2003 data from the U.S. Census Bureau, 25.8 percent of [New Orleans] population lives below the poverty line... This is more than twice the national average, but is close tot he percentages in other American cities such as Miami (28.5), Los Angeles (22.1), Atlanta (24.4), and New York City (21.2).
explicacao: Citação de Billy Sothern sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “According to the 2003 data from the U.S. Census Bureau, 25.8 percent of [New Orleans] population …” articula reflexao, poverty, according em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: According to the 2003 data from the U.S. Census Bureau, 25.8 percent of [New Orleans] population lives below the poverty line... This is more than twice the national average, but is close tot he percentages in other American cities such as Miami (28.5), Los Angeles (22.1), Atlanta (24.4), and New York City (21.2).

texto: If people are troubled by their view, they ought to offer these New Orleanians, and black and poor people in the places like the Lower Ninth Ward around the country, a reason to believe otherwise.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Billy Sothern: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “If people are troubled by their view, they ought to offer these New Orleanians, and black and poo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiration, justice pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e justice.
